businessWorkflow.canonicalExecutionSpineRef: meta-theory Type C: Critical → Fetch → Thinking → Execution → Review → Meta-Review → Verification → Evolution (see canonical/skills/meta-theory/references/dev-governance.md). Business phase ids here are department-run vocabulary only; they do not rename or substitute spine stage names.

mirrorPolicy.rationale: Only team-ai runs produce articles eligible for ai-memory-demo mirror. Mirror failures do NOT block workflow terminal status; a daily cron picks up stragglers. Public display checks file-system presence of ai-memory-demo/.claude/skills/articles/drafts/<slug>.md rather than a DB flag.

cardTimingDescriptions.immediate: 立即执行，不等待任何前置条件
cardTimingDescriptions.next_stage: 等待下一个阶段开始后执行
cardTimingDescriptions.after_dependency: 等待dependsOn中声明的所有依赖项满足后执行（channel/gate/event三种语义，见dependencyContract）
cardTimingDescriptions.after_verify: 等待验证阶段完成后执行

userLanguagePolicy.description: Stage names such as Critical, Fetch, Thinking, and Review remain canonical protocol labels. Human-facing option labels, clarifying questions, explanations, and confirmation text must follow the user's latest language or explicit language preference instead of hardcoding Chinese, English, or any single locale.

claude.triggerDescription: Use AskUserQuestion for blocking Critical clarification only when Fetch cannot proceed, then use it once for Execution confirmation after contentEvidencePacket and preDecisionOptionFrame are complete.
claude.implementation: Invoke AskUserQuestion with questions array; platform natively supports modal popup.

codex.triggerDescription: Use Codex native choice only when a real host-provided choice tool is exposed to the agent; otherwise pause with a localized confirmation card. Codex CLI/exec and repository hook adapters must not claim a popup.
codex.implementation: Invoke the host-provided choice tool only when available; otherwise emit a localized markdown confirmation card, record conversation_fallback, and state that it is a chat card rather than a popup.

openclaw.triggerDescription: Use OpenClaw native agent/workspace choice mechanisms when available; otherwise emit a localized runtime card and wait for explicit user selection.
openclaw.implementation: Workspace-per-agent model; requires proper workspace configuration.

cursor.triggerDescription: Use Cursor native custom modes/mode picker and project rules for Critical, Fetch, Thinking, and Review selection; dynamic popup support is runtime-dependent.
cursor.implementation: Custom Modes / mode picker UI; fallback to conversation card.

userInteractionPolicy.description: Policy for when to use AskUserQuestion / native choice / fallback decision surfaces versus notice. Non-trivial non-query decisions require Fetch content evidence and Thinking option framing before interruption.

optionQualityStandard.description: Every option must specify: what changes, what problem it solves, advantages, and disadvantages

batchDecisionMode.description: When multiple independent questions exist, collect and present them in one interaction

codexVisibleMultiOptionOutput.description: Codex meta-theory delivery must show a short visible multi-option snapshot on every user-visible output, written in the user's latest language while keeping protocol identifiers canonical. This is a Codex presentation rule and does not replace preDecisionOptionFrame, formal confirmation gates, or Claude Code native AskUserQuestion behavior. When Codex falls back to conversation_fallback, it must be described as a chat card rather than a popup.

protocolFirst.description: intentPacket is required in run artifacts when taskClassification.governanceFlow is listed in intentPacketRequiredWhenGovernanceFlows (IntentGate-style intent lock-in). intentGatePacket is required for the same flows (structured ambiguity / assumptions gate before Execution). contentEvidencePacket and preDecisionOptionFrame are required before AskUserQuestion / native choice / conversation fallback for non-trivial non-query work; they prove Fetch evidence and Thinking option framing happened before interruption. dispatchEnvelopePacket, dispatchBoard, and workerTaskPacket are finalized only after user choice or an allowed recorded skip. dispatchEnvelopePacket is required for all non-pure-query flows so every executable run has an explicit owner, capability boundary, memory mode, and review / verification routing before dispatch. orchestrationTaskBoardPacket is the mandatory Conductor task board for the same executable flows. businessFlowBlueprintPacket and agentBlueprintPacket are required before workerTaskPacket so Conductor proves the full business flow was considered before dispatch. capabilityGapPacket is required when taskClassification.upgradeReasons records owner_creation_required, or when agentBlueprintPacket.roleCoverageGate fails with missing roles whose ownerResolution is upgrade_existing_owner or create_owner_first. executionAgentCard is required when capabilityGapPacket resolves the gap through execution-agent creation or upgrade, or when agentBlueprintPacket ownerResolution chooses upgrade_existing_owner or create_owner_first.

reviewOutputProtocol.description: Review phase output must start with a deliverable frontmatter block containing title, summary, and worker roles in YAML. After the frontmatter, the consolidated deliverable body follows. A --- separator divides the body from per-worker scores.

softPublicReadyTodoGate.description: When the env var is set to 1 and summaryPacket.publicReady is true, no workerTaskPacket may have taskTodoState === "open". Omitted field is treated as compliant.

softCommentReviewGate.description: When the env var is set to 1 and summaryPacket.publicReady is true, summaryPacket.commentReviewAcknowledged must be true (team acknowledgment that comments/docs were reviewed for AI-slop patterns).

researchCapabilityDiscovery.description: Fetch-stage preflight for research-capability discovery. The evidence owner must identify the current runtime and actual tool inventory sources, then select a research path from observed retrieval capabilities. Do not use host-form-factor enums such as platformSurface; decide from capability proof, limitations, and selectedResearchPath.

contentEvidencePacket.description: Fetch-stage evidence required before any user choice surface for non-trivial non-query work. It records what content was read or verified, which research/retrieval capabilities were actually available in the current runtime, how the evidence owner performed deep research, how findings map to decision impact, and how Conductor validated the evidence lane.

fetchPacket.description: Explicit Fetch-stage packet: which projects were checked, which local/global sources were consulted, which capabilities matched, which gaps remain, and which graph/knowledge sources influenced the run.

preDecisionOptionFrame.description: Thinking-stage pre-decision frame for non-trivial executable work before AskUserQuestion, native choice, or fallback. It contains contentEvidence-backed candidate orchestration paths and trade-offs only; it is not a finalized dispatchEnvelopePacket, dispatchBoard, or workerTaskPacket.

intentPacket.description: Structured user-intent lock before heavy execution: what they really want, how we know we are done, and explicit out-of-scope items.

intentGatePacket.description: Structured pre-execution gate: whether ambiguities are cleared, if the user must still choose, documented default assumptions, native/fallback choice surface, and the recorded skip reason when the choice gate is allowed to be skipped.

dispatchEnvelopePacket.description: Mandatory execution shell for non-query flows: who owns the task, which short business role is being dispatched, which capabilities are allowed/blocked, what memory policy the child gets, and which owners close review / verification. This packet may not finalize before userChoiceState records a user choice or an explicit auto-proceed / choiceGateSkip allowed by preDecisionOptionFrame. Runtime-assigned nicknames may be recorded as runtimeInstanceAlias only; they must never replace roleDisplayName.

orchestrationTaskBoardPacket.description: Conductor-owned task board for executable work. It says who does what, in what order, what each task must deliver, and who synthesizes the final result.

businessFlowBlueprintPacket.description: Conductor-owned business-flow blueprint produced before worker tasks. It requires the system to infer task-specific business lanes from the requested outcome, scope, and deliverable type; planning dimensions may include product, UX, UI, frontend, backend, data, motion, test, QA, security, release, feedback, and evolution when relevant. Every lane object in requiredLanes or optionalLanes must carry global capability scan evidence: capabilitySearchQuery, candidateOwners, candidateSkills, selectedOwner, selectionReason, and coverageStatus. Omitted lanes require explicit human-readable reasons.

namingPolicy.description: User-visible agent names must be coarse business role-family names such as 前端, 后端, 测试, frontend, backend, test. Do not use scoped work-item names as roleDisplayName; put feature, page, installation, shard, or task detail in roleInstanceId, shardScope, assignedResponsibilitySlice, or task text. Host-generated personal nicknames such as Huygens or Mill may be recorded only as runtimeInstanceAlias.

oversizedGovernanceAgentPolicy.description: A large governance agent may stay intact only when it owns a coherent governance boundary; otherwise split supporting detail into references while preserving the agent identity boundary.

agentBlueprintPacket.description: Capability-first role blueprint. It separates businessRoleId, roleDisplayName, selected owner agent, assigned responsibility slice, owner responsibility delta, and per-run role instances so the same agent can run multiple named shards in parallel without confusing users. ownerResolution uses reuse_existing_owner, upgrade_existing_owner, or create_owner_first.

orchestrationTask.description: Conductor编排板中的单个任务单元。dependsOn声明前置依赖，见dependencyContract定义。

capabilityGapPacket.description: Human-language capability gap sheet. It records why current owners are insufficient and what decision was made before the execution-agent factory starts.

executionAgentCard.description: Mandatory execution-agent role card whenever the factory creates or upgrades an execution agent. The card defines purpose, boundaries, dependencies, inputs, and outputs.

workerTaskPacket.description: 派发给worker agent的执行任务包。三大编排核心字段：dependsOn（前置依赖，见dependencyContract）/ parallelGroup（并行分组）/ mergeOwner（合并负责人）。roleDisplayName 是用户可见的短业务岗位名；runtimeInstanceAlias 只记录宿主临时昵称，不能替代业务名。verifySteps 提供原子级完成标准，用于 Verification 阶段的逐条检查。This packet may not finalize before userChoiceState records a user choice or an explicit auto-proceed / choiceGateSkip allowed by preDecisionOptionFrame.

type.description: channel=点对点消息传递/gate=质量门放行/event=发布订阅

timeout_ms.description: 等待依赖满足的超时时间（毫秒），默认5分钟

backoff_ms.description: 重试间隔（毫秒），支持指数退避

onTimeout.description: 超时行为：skip=跳过依赖继续/abort=中止任务/use_fallback=使用兜底产物

artifact.description: 兜底产物路径或默认schema路径

parallelGroupField.description: 并行分组标识。同组内所有任务可并行执行，必须声明mergeOwner接收合并结果

mergeOwnerField.description: 并行组的合并负责人，负责汇总同组所有worker的结果后再推进后续依赖链

sameOwnerMultiInstancePolicy.description: 同一个 ownerAgent 可以并行启动多个实例，但每个实例必须有短业务岗位 roleDisplayName、唯一 roleInstanceId、明确 shardKey / shardScope、workspaceIsolation、artifactNamespace、collisionPolicy 和统一 mergeOwner。同一 ownerAgent 的并行实例如果共享 parallelGroup，必须指向同一个 mergeOwner；没有这些字段或合并规则的重复 ownerAgent 是伪并行。

verifyStepsField.description: 原子级步骤验证清单。每步定义具体完成标准，Verification 阶段逐条检查。源自 Karpathy Goal-Driven Execution 的 [Step] → verify: [check] 格式。

triggerVsSkipReasonCheck.description: Review must compare taskClassification.triggerReasons with any skipReason / choiceGateSkip. If decision triggers existed and no valid skip reason was recorded, Review fails.

compactionPacket.description: Local-only handoff packet stored under .meta-kim/state. It preserves unresolved findings, pending revision state, verify gate status, single-deliverable closure state, summary delta, and writeback decision for compaction / cross-session continuation. It is not a public-ready artifact.

dependencyContract.description: 编排顺序依赖契约——定义agent间前后关系的标准格式。三种依赖语义覆盖所有前后端联调场景。

channel.label: 通道式（点对点消息）
channel.semantic: producer生成消息，consumer从共享存储（artifact store）读取locator。消息体不经过dispatcher信道，避免payload膨胀。
channel.useCase: 前后端artifact传递、文件产物交接、API响应回传
channel.example: frontend_agent产出build产物路径 → backend_agent读取build hash继续编译

gate.label: 阶段门式（质量门）
gate.semantic: 前置任务产出物必须通过schema验证才放行后续任务。不是简单的时间等待，是质量关卡。
gate.useCase: OpenAPI schema校验、代码规范检查、安全扫描通过后才推进
gate.example: frontend_agent输出api-contract.yaml → backend_agent必须验证schema含paths/components才生成代码

event.label: 事件订阅式
event.semantic: producer发布事件，consumer订阅并可选filter过滤。blocking=true则等待，false则旁听。
event.useCase: 部署完成事件、CI通过事件、监控告警事件触发后续任务
event.example: deploy_agent发布deployment_started事件 → smoke_test_agent订阅并filter=env==staging才执行

timeoutStrategy.recommendation: 前端构建类依赖建议600000ms（10分钟），接口响应类建议300000ms（5分钟），CI任务建议60000ms（1分钟）

dependencyContract.dagValidation: dependsOn声明在Stage 3（Thinking）由Conductor构建DAG图。必须检测循环依赖，循环依赖的task不得进入Stage 4。

frontendBackendContract.description: 前后端联调的标准依赖模板
